name: Cascadia Haze
description: A bright, cerebral sativa born in the foggy lowlands of the Cascades. Cascadia Haze carries the sharp citrus snap of Pacific air with a golden morning energy that keeps creative momentum flowing without the crash.

name: Rainier Kush
description: Named for the mountain that watches over the Puget Sound, Rainier Kush is a heavy, earthen indica with the deep resin of old-growth forest. Expect a full-body release and a long, peaceful night.

name: Hood River Haze
description: A balanced hybrid born at the intersection of river valley and volcanic ridge. Opens with a sativa clarity and settles into a mellow indica warmth.

name: Olympic Fog
description: Inspired by the perpetual mist rolling off the Olympic Peninsula, this dense hybrid wraps you in calm focus.

name: Puget Sound CBD
description: A high-CBD cultivar crafted for the wellness-focused consumer. Calm clarity without intoxication — perfect for daytime relief or anyone new to cannabis.

name: Willamette Valley OG
description: Born in the fertile valley between the Coast Range and the Cascades. A bold, resinous indica with notes of fuel and dark fruit.

name: Emerald City Diesel
description: A pungent diesel-forward sativa with the gritty soul of downtown Seattle. Sharp, alert, electric — for the long workday or a late-night studio session.

name: Ballard Blueberry
description: A sweet indica with deep berry notes. Soft body relaxation and a gentle mind quiet — Ballard fishing-village twilight in a jar.

name: Capitol Hill Lemon
description: Bright and bubbly, the social butterfly of strains. Capitol Hill Lemon is your aperitif before a Pike-Pine night out.

name: Fremont Fire
description: A high-octane hybrid with the unconventional spirit of Fremont. Loud, expressive, and a touch surreal — strong cerebral with a creeping body warmth.

name: Pike Place Pineapple
description: Tropical and tangy. Pike Place Pineapple bursts with sunshine flavor — a vacation in a bowl, perfect for grey Seattle mornings.

name: SODO Skunk
description: Classic skunky funk reborn. SODO Skunk is the warehouse-district pheno — gritty, dense, undeniably nostalgic.

name: Green Lake Glass
description: A balanced 3:1 chemotype with glassy clear-headed calm. Green Lake Glass delivers measured relief — therapeutic without overwhelm.

name: Bainbridge Bliss
description: Soft, sweet, and sunset-quiet. Bainbridge Bliss is the ferry-ride home — slow exhale, dropped shoulders, watercolor mind.

name: Snoqualmie Snow
description: Snow-capped trichomes and alpine air. A potent hybrid with sharp cerebral lift and a soft warm body — for high-altitude clarity.

name: Durban Pacific
description: A landrace-leaning pure sativa. Durban Pacific delivers the clean, focused, anxiety-free clarity that put landrace strains on the map.

name: Afghan PNW
description: A landrace Afghani phenotype acclimated to the PNW. Dense, hashy, deeply grounding — for traditionalists seeking timeless body relief.

name: ACDC Pacific
description: A near-zero THC, ultra-high CBD cultivar for serious therapeutic use. ACDC Pacific is medicine first, recreation never.

name: Tacoma Tangerine
description: Bright tangerine snap with creative wakefulness. The dockside hustle of Tacoma in strain form.

name: Gas Works Gas
description: A heavy, gassy, industrial-strength hybrid. Gas Works Gas hits like the namesake park silhouette — bold, weighty, unmistakable.

name: Mt Baker Mist
description: Mountain cool with a soft mist of CBD. Mt Baker Mist is the everyday balanced choice — happy without heavy, mellow without flat.

name: Wonderland Mints
description: A modern minty-sweet hybrid with dreamlike euphoria. Wonderland Mints opens with a tingle of cool and lands in plush body warmth.

name: Cherry Eastlake
description: A cherry-forward hybrid with houseboat-evening warmth. Mid-strength, deeply pleasant, and sociable.

name: Pearl District Purple
description: Royal purple hues and deep grape sedation. Pearl District Purple wraps the body in velvet quiet — a long-haul indica.

name: Forest Park Pine
description: Crisp pine and morning trail. Forest Park Pine clears the mind like cold air in evergreen — focused, calm, energizing.

name: Orcas Orange
description: Island-sweet orange creamsicle with a balanced hybrid lift. Orcas Orange is the kayak-paddle afternoon.

name: Lavender Larch
description: Soothing lavender, soft larch needles. A gentle, anxiolytic indica blend designed for evening unwind without the heavy weight.

name: Glacial Glue
description: Sticky like glacial silt, potent like the freeze itself. Glacial Glue is for high-tolerance consumers seeking heavy euphoria and full-body weight.

name: THCV Frost
description: A rare THCV-elevated cultivar. Energizing, appetite-curbing, and clear — a daytime stimulant-style sativa for the wellness adventurous.
This strain is named after it's high price in it's Hollywood home. As a 50/50 hybrid of indica and sativa, $100 OG does a great job offering pain relief with an alert, cerebral high.
